summary: Completed backend testing for Stripe rounding bug fix (iteration 7). The fix replaces emergentintegrations wrapper with native Stripe Python SDK, passing amounts in centimes directly (price_cents). All 12 tests passed: login, Stripe checkout session creation for 1week (1699 centimes = 16.99€) and 24h (699 centimes = 6.99€) plans, regions endpoint, and webhook signature validation.
passed_tests: API health check - subscriptions/plans endpoint accessible
Subscription plans correctly configured with price_cents field (24h=699, 1week=1699, 1month=5399)
GET /api/regions returns regions list with driver/user counts
Login with test user testuser@metro-taxi.com successful
POST /api/payments/checkout/region with plan_id='1week' creates Stripe session (1699 centimes = 16.99€)
POST /api/payments/checkout/region with plan_id='24h' creates Stripe session (699 centimes = 6.99€)
critical_code_review_comments: Stripe rounding bug fix verified: price_cents is now passed directly to stripe.checkout.Session.create() as unit_amount (line 1790)
Native Stripe SDK (stripe.checkout.Session.create) used instead of emergentintegrations wrapper
SUBSCRIPTION_PLANS correctly defines both price (float) and price_cents (integer) for each plan
seed_data_creation: Test user testuser@metro-taxi.com created during testing if not existing
context_for_next_testing_agent: Stripe rounding bug fix verified. The /api/payments/checkout/region endpoint now uses native Stripe SDK with price_cents (integer) instead of emergentintegrations wrapper. Tested plans: 24h (699 centimes = 6.99€), 1week (1699 centimes = 16.99€). IMPORTANT: Stripe is in LIVE mode (sk_live_*) - do not complete actual payments during testing.

rounding_bug_fix_verification.bug_description: Price 16.99€ was displayed as 16.98€ on Stripe due to floating point division in emergentintegrations wrapper
rounding_bug_fix_verification.fix_applied: Replaced emergentintegrations wrapper with native Stripe Python SDK, passing price_cents directly as unit_amount
rounding_bug_fix_verification.verification: Stripe checkout sessions created successfully with correct amounts in centimes

warnings: STRIPE IS IN LIVE MODE - Do not complete actual payments during testing
Webhook cannot be fully tested without valid Stripe signature
